textByHash.052dd12984aa98f685103b66a7baad5b4be37955: Grrr, little animal; I shall destroy you!
textByHash.cf62176cab0d31667d39911abb2c88e70c84d082: Arr, small thing wants my food, does it? I'll teach you to deal with ogres!
textByHash.d8314aa196cc86b956c0b05cf1835ae9d14c848b: Trade with me? Who do you think you are?
